description: Style NoteElevate your style to become the envy of the fashion crowd with this toniq necklace. Clash them with your season essentials (preferably tonal pastels) for a unique twist. Product DetailsRed, white and black glass beads connected by gold links, can be worn as a single or double strand chainMaterial and CareGlass beadsWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 90 cm
